8d1e1da5-8e0b-46a4-88d7-9eba2c5df95c.text: The Gray Man (spelled with an 'A') is not upcoming—it was released on Netflix in July 2022. It stars Ryan Gosling and Chris Evans as a CIA operative and his former colleague turned assassin. If you meant a different title or are looking for truly upcoming films, let me know!

8d391e07-beef-463e-9001-f25e8681275a.text: how can I book movies using this app?

9586bb2c-a68b-494c-b78c-ba7526d1cdf3.text:
I don't have real-time access to current cinema showtimes or movie listings as my knowledge is not live-updated. For the most accurate and current information on movies playing in Ahmedabad cinemas, I recommend checking these trusted sources directly:

1. Visit the BookMyShow website or app and select Ahmedabad as your city
2. Check the official websites or apps of major multiplex chains like PVR Cinemas INOX Carnival Cinemas or Cinepolis operating in Ahmedabad
3. Look at local entertainment sections in Ahmedabad newspapers like Ahmedabad Mirror or Times of Ahmedabad for weekly listings

These platforms update showtimes and movie schedules frequently so you'll get the latest details on what's screening right now. Is there anything else I can help you with regarding movie genres ratings or general recommendations?

d0129ef4-7176-4961-928d-e6d652513a5f.text: Priyanka Chopra Jonas is an Indian actress, producer, and singer known for her work in Bollywood and Hollywood films like Quantico and Baywatch, and she is married to Nick Jonas.

d3065832-a909-474c-8f0b-f951b79c7fd8.text:
To book movies in the BookMyMovie app:  
1. Open the app and browse or search for a movie  
2. Select the movie and choose your preferred showtime  
3. Pick your seats from the seating chart  
4. Proceed to payment and confirm your booking  Let me know if you need help with any specific step!

eb28e868-fcf4-468d-87c8-8eee06c81a90.text: I'm doing great thanks! Ready to help you find movies, check showtimes, or get recommendations. What movie are you interested in today?

-OllacCtDM34wKg2AXwQ.author: Tom
-OllacCtDM34wKg2AXwQ.content: A great movie to watch for those who love some suspense with thriller movies
-OllacCtDM34wKg2AXwQ.movieDescription: Trying to escape her past, Millie Calloway accepts a job as a live-in housemaid for the wealthy Nina and Andrew Winchester. But what begins as a dream job quickly unravels into something far more dangerous—a sexy, seductive game of secrets, scandal, and power.

-Ollh4XD6fz6-xNOZ-Sq.author: MG

840464.description: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.
840464.title: Greenland 2: Migration (2026)

1236153.description: In the near future, a detective stands on trial accused of murdering his wife. He has ninety minutes to prove his innocence to the advanced AI Judge he once championed, before it determines his fate.
1236153.title: Mercy (2026)
